Plan a trip ↗

04 / Coast

Salt on
your skin.

Whitewashed lanes, ferry hops, and dinners that stretch until the sea goes ink-blue.

07 days From $2,390 Host Leo 2 seats left

Cyclades

Leo treats ferry schedules like a suggestion and dinner like religion. You’ll hop islands without racing them — swim first, plan second.

Expect white lanes that glow at noon, hidden tavernas, and nights that end with salt still on your skin and no one checking their watch.

Day 01
Arrive soft

Harbor drop-off, first swim, sundown on the porch.

Day 02–03
Wander wide

Village loops, cliff paths, the beach that isn’t on the brochure.

Day 04
Island hop

Ferry to a quieter sister island. Long lunch. Later return.

Day 05
Feast slowly

Leo’s preferred taverna. Stay past dessert.

Day 06–07
Leave lighter

One more morning swim. Soft goodbye.

Trip details

  • Length07 days
  • From$2,390
  • HostLeo
  • StayTide House
  • DatesMay 9–15 · 2026
  • Seats2 seats left
